summary:
There is no documented evidence linking SMOC2 to wound healing; despite some overlap in naming with SMO involved in hedgehog signaling, SMOC2 has not been shown to be expressed or functional in this context. Consequently, based on current scientific knowledge, SMOC2 is not considered part of wound healing mechanisms.  

Final Answer: B
